excerpts.title: Qiskit 1.1 primitive guidance
excerpts.content: Qiskit 1.1 docs continue to center primitive-based execution and observable evaluation. Versioned examples keep Sampler and Estimator usage explicit so retrieval can ground prompts in the target release.

excerpts.title: SparsePauliOp examples
excerpts.content: Qiskit 1.1 quantum_info docs show SparsePauliOp.from_list as the standard compact way to define observables such as [("ZI", 0.5), ("IZ", 0.5)].

excerpts.title: Circuit library ansatz classes
excerpts.content: Qiskit 1.1 circuit library examples still highlight TwoLocal for compact ansatz construction and expose its parameter count via num_parameters.

excerpts.title: Offline-safe text circuit drawing
excerpts.content: Offline examples should use circuit.draw(output="text") or print(circuit) when rendering diagrams in environments without GUI support.
